companyAccount.description: Your company account. If you only specify this parameter, the response includes all terminals at all account levels.

merchantAccount.description: The merchant account. This is required if you are retrieving the terminals assigned to a store.If you don't specify a `store` the response includes the terminals assigned to the specified merchant account and the terminals assigned to the stores under this merchant account.

store.description: The store code of the store. With this parameter, the response only includes the terminals assigned to the specified store.
